title: sample_subsets.tsv row schema
description: One row per named sample subset. Produced by registries/build_registries.py. Used by downstream engines to pull the right sample list for a given analysis.

subset_id.description: Stable id. Common values: 'all', 'pruned'. Free-form for custom subsets.

subset_type.description: Logical class of subset. Vocabulary: 'full_cohort', 'unrelated_pruned', 'karyotype_homA', 'karyotype_het', 'karyotype_homB', 'family_<id>', 'wild', 'hatchery', etc. Extend as needed.

sample_list_path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to a text file of sample IDs (one per line, BAM path or stripped basename). Engines call load_samples()-style readers on this.
